title: Item Models
description: Resize the models the way you want them to be!
body:
## About resoursepack

This texturepack contains tool and shield models in `json.` format. Thanks to this texturepack you will be able to resize your weapon or tool. 

The `"display"` parameters will help you to change it. 

## A little instruction

As an example, we will resize the first-person stone pick in the right hand. To do that, we need to rename a "diamond_pickaxe" file to "stone_pickaxe" and open it. Find a `"firstperson_righthand"` paragraph. Сhange `"scale"` values to the parameters we need. Done!
